response.step_by_step_log:
1. Analyzed the video and identified two main characters, 'Biboo' and 'Fake Biboo'.
2. Noticed dialogue between the characters at the beginning.
3. Identified the song 'Weight of the World' (壊レタ世界ノ歌) by Keiichi Okabe from the on-screen text at 00:59.
4. Performed a search for '"Weight of the World" NieR:Automata Japanese and English lyrics' to get the full lyrics for the song.
5. Divided the lyrics into English-sung parts and Japanese-sung parts to populate the JSON fields.
6. Mapped the scenes and generated the final JSON structure.
response.global_summary: A performance of "Weight of the World" from the NieR:Automata soundtrack, featuring VTubers 'Biboo' and 'Fake Biboo' in an arcade-themed setting. The song is a multilingual (English and Japanese) performance.

scenes.description: The performance starts with a dialogue, then transitions into the singing of 'Weight of the World' by the two characters, 'Biboo' and 'Fake Biboo'. The song alternates between English and Japanese verses throughout the performance.
scenes.song_title: Weight of the World / 壊レタ世界ノ歌

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
I feel like I'm losing hope
In my body and my soul
And the sky, it looks so ominous
And as time comes to a halt
Silence starts to overflow
My cries are inconspicuous
Tell me God, are you punishing me?
Is this the price I'm paying for my past mistakes?
This is my redemption song
I need you more than ever right now
Can you hear me now?
'Cause we're gonna shout it loud
Even if our words seem meaningless
It's like I'm carrying the weight of the world
I wish that someway, somehow
That I could save every one of us
But the truth is that I'm only one girl
Maybe if I keep believing
My dreams will come to life
Come to life
